title: Neural rosette banking

steps: Make 2x stock of serum-free neural freezing medium by adding 10 mL of sterile DMSO to 40 mL of sterile KOSR into a 50 ml conical tube. Mix by inverting 3-4 times. Store at 4 °C for up to 4 weeks.
Aspirate supernatant from 15mL conical tube containing 1 well of neural rosette clusters. See protocol below. Neural Rosette Formation and Selection by Celeste M M. Karch

Add 1.5 mL of neural induction media supplemented with 1.5 mL of 2x neural freezing medium to the single well collection of neural rosette clusters. Gently mix solution and distribute 1 mL into sterile cryovials.
Store cryovials at -80 °C for at least 48:00:00 then transfer to liquid nitrogen for long-term storage.
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
